ac_evidence.ac: Go Version Matrix: Test against multiple Go 1.25.x versions (e.g., 1.25.0, 1.25.7)
Race Detection: All tests run with -race flag to detect data races
Integration Tests: Add end-to-end integration tests for critical paths
Performance Benchmarks: Add benchmarks for key simulation components
Build Verification: Verify build succeeds for different OS/arch combinations (optional)
Test Coverage: Maintain or improve test coverage after changes
CI Pipeline: All checks pass in updated CI pipeline

existing_work_summary: Found existing integration tests in internal/simulation/integration_test.go, benchmarks in internal/simulation/benchmark_test.go, and existing CI workflow and Makefile with basic test targets. Extended with version matrix, race detection, integration test target, and benchmark target.
